# Create the enhanced admin index.html (login page) and dashboard.html # Also create a shared admin.js for common functionality # First, the admin login page (index.html) admin_index_html = ''' Admin Login | Global Banking Empowerment

or

ðŸ‘¤ Demo Credentials

Email: admin@globalbanking.com
Password: admin123

All actions are saved to your browser's localStorage. Data persists across page refreshes but resets if you clear browser data.

''' with open('/mnt/agents/output/index.html', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(admin_index_html) print("admin index.html (login) created successfully!")
